title: Create: Air Ducts
description: Air Ducts: Create add-on that adds means to manipulate airflows from encased fans.
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34b6d350958bf8d6738dae9daacdd0a7e3a2c74f.png)

## **Air Ducts – A Create Add-On for the Breeze-Inclined**

Tired of rearranging your whole build just to get that Encased Fan lined up just right? Want to give your contraptions a cleaner, more flexible way to blow air around (literally)? Air Ducts is here to help!

This work-in-progress add-on mod for Create introduces a simple but powerful concept: ducting for air flow.

 With a few new blocks you can now reroute fan output to wherever you need it. Chain the ducts together in a 2D or a 3D route. Around corners, through walls, across builds—no problem! 
## 
###  Use Air Ducts to:

- Tidy up your fan-powered automation

- Reach those annoying spots that just won’t line up

- Look like a redstone HVAC engineer while you’re at it
## 
**Features:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
<details>
<summary>Straight vent</summary>
  
**Straight vent:** the most basic one. Simply relays the airflow forward.
Crafting ingredient for other vent types.

  ![Straight vent block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/839da3230a9eb0cec53e82358b3eca6a760f637d.png)

  ![Crafting recipe: andesite scaffolding surrounded by iron sheets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f963310558a698cde30d2fd48fec8cffd60a338.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Knee vent</summary>

**Knee vent:** relays the airflow to 90 degrees.
Crafting ingredient for other vent types.

![Knee vent block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca7a4aa6d93fad020e6398d97ca57cb7fa30672e.png)

![Knee vent block crafts directly from straight one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4067ea880a11198bb3feb41c589c842598375c40.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Splitter vent</summary>

**Splitter vent:** has two outputs: one flow continues forward and the other - at 90 degrees.

![Splitter vent block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed4b2a11476b04213770b897c4219a6627ab9897.png)

![Splitter crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdaa765ce9a81ea4dce14e0d47ba415c95d21c16.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Junction vent</summary>

**Junction vent:** also got two outputs, both are relayed at 90 degrees and in opposite directions.

![Junction vent block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f078dd975963ed7615d62c0e54bca18f61edf184.png)

![Junction vent crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02ca2b3fb030d38af1c5831a03307ff461b60b7b.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Infuser</summary>

**Infuser:** apllies processing effect to the airflow _pushing_ through it. 

Any vent connected to the infuser will inherit and relay the processing type further.

Right-click with an empty hand to cycle through the effects.

![Infuser vent block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41660d70e9b0331d2f18917f70b908fc664659ff.png)

![Infuser crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b243b2dbd3bb654f1a825c3c6649a097dc6db0.png)

</details>

</details>

## 
**All vents can be rotated with a wrench.**

Angled vents are a bit trickier to set up but it's easy to get the hang of it:

- When placed the vent will be in it's "packed" state, inoperable.
- Whack it with a wrench to put the INPUT side on the face _opposite_ to the one you hit.
- Right-clicking it again will rotate the OUTPUT side anti-clockwise.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8vuvmHWgDaM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 

This mod is still WIP and more things are on the way:
- Fancier models
- New vents (valve, fast processing, crawlable?...)
- Custom flow types? (e.g. poison: to harm mobs and destroy vegetation)

## 

💛 Like the mod? Want to support development?

You can check out my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/ateamofone) page! I’ll be posting behind-the-scenes stuff, in-dev features, and the occasional duct-related ramble.
Tips are totally optional—but very appreciated and help keep the airflow going. :)
